name: nostalgia_v1
description: Warm, character-focused strategy highlighting early career milestones.

sequence.prompt: Aesthetic, nostalgic intro for {actor_name}. Soft film grain, elegant typography: '{actor_name} in {title_text}'. Warm VO: 'Take a trip back to where it all began for {actor_name}.'

sequence.guidance: A character-focused scene with {actor_name} showing emotional depth
A classic iconic moment for {actor_name} that shows their range

sequence.prompt: Clean branded outro. Minimalist design: 'Stream {title_text} Now'. Sophisticated VO: '{title_text} is now streaming. Follow the link to watch.'
